markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content ops, performance, and process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Backlog Unblocked:** Solution Engineers (SEs) will clear the 22-article backlog and adhere to a new 5-day SLA for future reviews, enabling immediate publication.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** A new strategy will focus on building trust in AI for audit and advisory, leveraging Fieldguide's "built by practitioners" story and its Goldman Sachs Series C investment.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Performance Optimization:** To improve the 30% engagement rate, GrowthX will add "Key Insights" (TLDRs) to articles, and Fieldguide will add a Table of Contents to the blog template.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [**Process Streamlined:** Weekly syncs will shift to a bi-weekly cadence, with Monday Slack updates, to focus meetings on strategic performance review.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)

## Topics

### Content Backlog & Process

  - [**Problem:** Holiday-related resource constraints created a 22-article backlog, preventing publication.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [**Solution:** SEs will now clear the backlog and adhere to a new 5-day SLA for all future reviews. Yasine will monitor this for two weeks to ensure compliance.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Yasine will ask Amanda to approve \~47 new topics in the Content OS by EOD tomorrow (Jan 9). Erik will first hide 8 competitive articles pending a strategy discussion with Mark.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)

### Product Feature Accuracy

  - [**Problem:** Conflicting information was found between an SE's feedback (Nathan) and the Fieldguide GPT regarding a feature's validation capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [**Solution:** The Product Feature Matrix was updated based on Nathan's feedback. To prevent future inaccuracies, a formal review is needed.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [**Action:** Erik will share the Notion link. Yasine will identify the correct reviewer (e.g., Phil) and provide their email for Notion access.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)

### Performance & Optimization

  - [**Traffic:** Grew to a peak of \~125 sessions/week in December.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [**Engagement Rate:** Averages \~30%, below the 40% target.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
      - [**Hypotheses:** Misaligned user intent or long articles causing users to scan.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [**Optimizations:**](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Add "Key Insights" (TLDRs) to the top of articles.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [**Fieldguide:** Add a Table of Contents to the blog template (Yasine to ask web developer).](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [**LLM Citations:** Articles are now appearing as citations in Copilot and Perplexity, a key signal of authority and value.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)

### New Content Strategy: Building Trust

  - [**Rationale:** Address industry hesitation with AI in audit/advisory by building trust.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Proposed Angles:**](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Practitioner-Led:** Emphasize the "built by practitioners for practitioners" story.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Investor Validation:** Leverage the Goldman Sachs Series C investment as a trust signal.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [**Status:** Food for thought; Erik will consider the approach.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Yasine:**](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
      - [Ask Amanda to approve \~47 topics by EOD Jan 9.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
      - [Identify the Product Feature Matrix reviewer and provide their email to Erik.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [Ask the web developer to add a Table of Contents to the blog template.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
      - [Hide 8 competitive articles from the approval list.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [Share the Product Feature Matrix Notion link.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
      - [Add the identified reviewer to Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
      - [Add "Key Insights" (TLDRs) to new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/sc4-4Hd_6y1PgWe_ZBWZse_ET1vTVfKo?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
